comments.comment_text: Figure resolution is insufficient for the A3 format prints. Minimum 300 dpi required.
comments.summary_ko: A3 인쇄용 그림 해상도 부족. 최소 300 dpi 필요.

comments.comment_text: Inconsistent use of 'seabed' vs 'sea bed' throughout the document.
comments.summary_ko: 'seabed' vs 'sea bed' 용어 혼용. 통일 필요.

comments.comment_text: The coordinate system description mentions ETRS89 but data appears to be in WGS84. Please clarify.
comments.summary_ko: 좌표계 기술에 ETRS89 언급되나 데이터는 WGS84. 명확화 필요.
comments.response_text: Both systems are functionally identical for this survey area. Added clarification note.

comments.comment_text: Paragraph is difficult to follow. Please restructure for clarity.
comments.summary_ko: 문단 가독성 부족. 명확하게 재구성 필요.
comments.response_text: Paragraph restructured into three shorter sentences.

comments.comment_text: Figure legend is too small to read at A4 scale. Please increase font size.
comments.summary_ko: A4 스케일에서 범례 글자 너무 작음. 글꼴 크기 증가 필요.
comments.response_text: Legend font size increased from 6pt to 9pt.

comments.comment_text: Cross-reference to Appendix C is broken. Page number shows '??'.
comments.summary_ko: 부록 C 상호참조 깨짐. 페이지 번호 '??' 표시.

comments.comment_text: The magnetic anomaly interpretation seems incorrect for anomaly M-015. Please recheck against the raw data.
comments.summary_ko: 이상체 M-015 자력 해석 오류 가능성. 원시 데이터 대비 재확인 필요.
comments.response_text: Re-examined anomaly M-015. Interpretation updated based on additional data filtering.
